# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /workspaces/bf/tilck/build/kernel
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/workspaces/bf/tilck/toolchain4/host/linux-x86_64/portable/gcc-i386-musl/13.3.0/bin/i686-linux-addr2line

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/workspaces/bf/tilck/toolchain4/host/linux-x86_64/portable/gcc-i386-musl/13.3.0/bin/i686-linux-gcc-ar

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/workspaces/bf/tilck/toolchain4/host/linux-x86_64/portable/gcc-i386-musl/13.3.0/bin/i686-linux-gcc-ranlib

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the ASM compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_ASM_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Debug

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/workspaces/bf/tilck/toolchain4/host/linux-x86_64/portable/gcc-i386-musl/13.3.0/bin/i686-linux-gcc-ar

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/workspaces/bf/tilck/toolchain4/host/linux-x86_64/portable/gcc-i386-musl/13.3.0/bin/i686-linux-gcc-ranlib

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/workspaces/bf/tilck/toolchain4/host/linux-x86_64/portable/gcc-i386-musl/13.3.0/bin/i686-linux-gcc-ar

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/workspaces/bf/tilck/toolchain4/host/linux-x86_64/portable/gcc-i386-musl/13.3.0/bin/i686-linux-gcc-ranlib

//Flags used by the C compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_DLLTOOL:FILEPATH=CMAKE_DLLTOOL-NOTFOUND

//Flags used by the linker during all build types.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS:UNINITIALIZED=1

//Value Computed by CMake.
CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_REDIRECTS_DIR:STATIC=/workspaces/bf/tilck/build/kernel/CMakeFiles/pkgRedirects

//Install path prefix, prepended onto install directories.
CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=/usr/local

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_LINKER:FILEPATH=/workspaces/bf/tilck/toolchain4/host/linux-x86_64/portable/gcc-i386-musl/13.3.0/bin/i686-linux-ld

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gmake

// all build types.

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME:STATIC=kernel

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_READELF:FILEPATH=/workspaces/bf/tilck/toolchain4/host/linux-x86_64/portable/gcc-i386-musl/13.3.0/bin/i686-linux-readelf

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during all build types.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//If set, runtime paths are not added when installing shared libraries,
// but are added when building.
CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//If set, runtime paths are not added when using shared libraries.
CMAKE_SKIP_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during all build types.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_TAPI:FILEPATH=CMAKE_TAPI-NOTFOUND

//The CMake toolchain file
CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE:FILEPATH=/workspaces/bf/tilck/other/cmake/i386-linux-gcc.cmake

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
GCC_TOOLCHAIN_BIN:UNINITIALIZED=/workspaces/bf/tilck/toolchain4/host/linux-x86_64/portable/gcc-i386-musl/13.3.0/bin

//Use a larger buffer for I/O
KRN_BIG_IO_BUF:BOOL=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
KRN_FBCON_BIGFONT_THR:UNINITIALIZED=160

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
KRN_FB_CONSOLE_BANNER:UNINITIALIZED=ON

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
KRN_FB_CONSOLE_CURSOR_BLINK:UNINITIALIZED=ON

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
KRN_FB_CONSOLE_FAILSAFE_OPT:UNINITIALIZED=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
KRN_FB_CONSOLE_USE_ALT_FONTS:UNINITIALIZED=OFF

//Compile in the hang detector and per-task state dumper
KRN_HANG_DETECTION:BOOL=OFF

//Custom first kmalloc heap size
KRN_KMALLOC_CUSTOM_FIRST_HEAP:BOOL=OFF

//First kmalloc heap size (KB)
KRN_KMALLOC_FIRST_HEAP_SIZE_KB:STRING=128

//Poison freed memory in kfree()
KRN_KMALLOC_FREE_MEM_POISONING:BOOL=OFF

//Count allocations per distinct size (diagnostic)
KRN_KMALLOC_HEAVY_STATS:BOOL=OFF

//Compile-in kmalloc debug messages
KRN_KMALLOC_SUPPORT_DEBUG_LOG:BOOL=OFF

//Compile-in kmalloc's leak detector
KRN_KMALLOC_SUPPORT_LEAK_DETECTOR:BOOL=OFF

//Max open handles per process (keep small)
KRN_MAX_HANDLES:STRING=16

//Use 1-tick time slice (stress test)
KRN_MINIMAL_TIME_SLICE:BOOL=OFF

//Floor under SCHED_LATENCY_TICKS / nr_running
KRN_MIN_GRANULARITY_TICKS:STRING=2

//Warn on calls to not-implemented syscalls
KRN_NO_SYS_WARN:BOOL=OFF

//Print info when killing a process on page fault
KRN_PAGE_FAULT_PRINTK:BOOL=OFF

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
KRN_PCI_VENDORS_LIST:UNINITIALIZED=OFF

//Always flush printk() on the current TTY
KRN_PRINTK_ON_CURR_TTY:BOOL=ON

//Check need_resched in enable_preemption()
KRN_RESCHED_ENABLE_PREEMPT:BOOL=OFF

//Target scheduling latency in ticks
KRN_SCHED_LATENCY_TICKS:STRING=20

//Show Tilck's logo at boot
KRN_SHOW_LOGO:BOOL=ON

//Isolate the kernel stack in high virtual memory
KRN_STACK_ISOLATION:BOOL=ON

//Keep kernel symbol tables in the image
KRN_SYMBOLS:BOOL=ON

//Lines to scroll on Shift+PgUp / Shift+PgDown
KRN_TERM_SCROLL_LINES:STRING=5

//Kernel timer frequency in Hz
KRN_TIMER_HZ:STRING=250

//Force minimal kernel size (advanced)
KRN_TINY_KERNEL:BOOL=OFF

//Enable trace_printk() from boot time
KRN_TRACE_PRINTK_ON_BOOT:BOOL=ON

//Track nested interrupts
KRN_TRACK_NESTED_INTERR:BOOL=ON

//User-process stack size (pages)
KRN_USER_STACK_PAGES:STRING=16

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
TILCK_CONFIG_FILE:UNINITIALIZED=/workspaces/bf/tilck/build/tilck_config.cmake

//Value Computed by CMake
kernel_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/workspaces/bf/tilck/build/kernel

//Value Computed by CMake
kernel_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
kernel_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/workspaces/bf/tilck/kernel
